title: Mining Progress
description: Mining Progress is a must-have utility resource pack that transforms the standard, boring destruction cracks into a clear, color-coded visual indicator
body:
**Why you need this:**

Color Feedback: The cracks change from Red to Yellow to Green as you mine

Cave Friendly: High-contrast colors make it easy to see in low-light conditions

Vanilla+: Designed to be simplistic (16x) and fit perfectly with any other pack

Up to Date: Fully compatible with the latest 26.2 versions

**Setup:**

Download the file

Drop it into your resourcepacks folder

Move it to the top of the list in-game
